message: franken_networkx-6orz: preserve multigraph to_directed edge order

files.patch:
@@ -14696,6 +14696,19 @@ def _graph_to_directed_copy(self):
     return result
 
 
+def _multigraph_to_directed_copy(self):
+    result = self.to_directed_class()()
+    result.graph.update(deepcopy(self.graph))
+    result.add_nodes_from((node, deepcopy(attrs)) for node, attrs in self.nodes(data=True))
+    result.add_edges_from(
+        (source, target, key, deepcopy(attrs))
+        for source in self
+        for target, keyed_attrs in self.adj[source].items()
+        for key, attrs in keyed_attrs.items()
+    )
+    return result
+
+
 def _graph_to_directed_with_view(to_directed_impl):
     @wraps(to_directed_impl)
     def to_directed(self, as_view=False):
@@ -14706,6 +14719,16 @@ def to_directed(self, as_view=False):
     return to_directed
 
 
+def _multigraph_to_directed_with_view(to_directed_impl):
+    @wraps(to_directed_impl)
+    def to_directed(self, as_view=False):
+        if as_view is True:
+            return _generic_directed_graph_view(self)
+        return _multigraph_to_directed_copy(self)
+
+    return to_directed
+
+
 def _to_directed_with_view(to_directed_impl):
     @wraps(to_directed_impl)
     def to_directed(self, as_view=False):

-MultiGraph.to_directed = _to_directed_with_view(_MULTIGRAPH_TO_DIRECTED)
+MultiGraph.to_directed = _multigraph_to_directed_with_view(_MULTIGRAPH_TO_DIRECTED)
 MultiDiGraph.to_directed = _to_directed_with_view(_MULTIDIGRAPH_TO_DIRECTED)
 Graph.to_undirected = _to_undirected_with_view(_GRAPH_TO_UNDIRECTED)
 DiGraph.to_undirected = _directed_to_undirected_with_view(_DIGRAPH_TO_UNDIRECTED)

@@ -1534,6 +1534,27 @@ def test_graph_to_directed_preserves_networkx_directed_edge_order(monkeypatch):
     assert list(result.edges(data=True)) == list(expected_result.edges(data=True))
 
 
+def test_multigraph_to_directed_preserves_networkx_multiedge_order(monkeypatch):
+    graph = fnx.MultiGraph()
+    expected = nx.MultiGraph()
+    for current in (graph, expected):
+        current.add_edge("a", "b", key="k1", weight=1)
+        current.add_edge("a", "b", key="k2", weight=2)
+        current.add_edge("b", "c", key="k3", weight=3)
+        current.add_edge("d", "a", key="k4", weight=4)
+
+    expected_result = expected.to_directed()
+
+    _block_networkx_utilities(monkeypatch, "to_directed")
+
+    result = graph.to_directed()
+
+    assert list(result.edges(keys=True)) == list(expected_result.edges(keys=True))
+    assert list(result.edges(keys=True, data=True)) == list(
+        expected_result.edges(keys=True, data=True)
+    )
+
+
 @pytest.mark.parametrize(
     ("fnx_cls", "nx_cls"),
